description: A dark, blue-tinted close-up of a curly-haired figure's face, styled to resemble a frame from a film, with a chromatic-aberration filter at the edges. Centered white text reads 'there won't be a shire, pippin' with smaller text below reading 'JOIN.ICE.GOV'.
notable_text: there won't be a shire, pippin; JOIN.ICE.GOV
